queries.query: Is it true that the Great Wall of China is visible from space with the naked eye?
Can you verify this claim: honey never spoils?
Fact-check this for me: humans only use 10 percent of their brain.
Did Einstein really fail math in school? Just want a quick verdict.
這個說法對嗎：每天一定要喝八杯水才健康
この主張は本当？ナポレオンはとても背が低かった
Is it accurate that a goldfish has only a 3-second memory?
Someone told me lightning never strikes the same place twice. True or false?
真的假的？吃宵夜一定會變胖
Quick check on one claim: NASA spent millions developing a space pen while the Soviets just used pencils.
Is the claim that we swallow eight spiders a year in our sleep correct?
事実確認してほしい：金魚の記憶は3秒しかもたない
Is it true bananas are berries but strawberries are not?
幫我查證一個說法：長城是唯一從太空可見的人造建築
Someone claims COVID vaccines contain tracking microchips. Is that true?
Verify whether the Coriolis effect determines which way water drains in a sink.
Write me a deep, multi-source research report on the state of solid-state battery commercialization.
I need a thorough multi-source analysis of remote-work productivity trends with citations.
深入研究一下台灣半導體產業的競爭格局，給我一份完整的報告
Here is my finished essay. Can you check that every citation actually supports the claim it is attached to and flag dead links?
Audit the references in this draft document and tell me which sources are misattributed.
Help me deeply understand this 60-page research paper, section by section.
